activities.details: Ozan and I stole the Kharid-ib to pay for Prince Ali's release. On our way to the handover, we were waylaid by bandits, quicksand, kalphites and the kidnapper's bodyguards. Ali was safely returned home and is now Al Kharid's new Emir.
activities.text: Quest complete: Diamond in the Rough

activities.details: Ozan and I stumbled across a plot to kidnap Prince Ali. The kidnappers got away, so we delivered the ransom to the Emir of Al Kharid, but he wasn't willing to pay the price...
